## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 — open an issue first for larger changes. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (provider / analyzer / report format / UI)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff)
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes (mypy --strict)
- [ ] `make test` passes (pytest)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change (analysis changes include a fixture/golden test)
- [ ] If the frontend changed: ran `make build` and committed the updated `src/aeo/web/dist`
- [ ] Updated docs / README where relevant
